summary: Sales Dashboard comprehensive testing - ALL TESTS PASSED (12/12 backend + All frontend). Verified: Total Revenue AED 2,174,969, Date filter dropdown works (Overall/This Month/This Year), Team-wise Revenue chart with drill-down to individual agents, Top 10 Agents chart, Monthly Revenue Trend, Month Comparison (March vs Feb 2026), Sales by Course donut chart, Monthly Leaderboard with top 5 agents, Lead Pipeline clickable navigation to Sales CRM, Today's Transactions modal, Scrollable modals (max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto), Dark mode color contrast verified.
passed_tests: Backend: test_filtered_stats_overall - Revenue AED 2,174,969, Leads 1223, Enrolled 902
Backend: test_filtered_stats_this_month - Revenue AED 119,655, Leads 345
Backend: test_filtered_stats_this_year - Revenue AED 650,354
Backend: test_team_revenue_endpoint - 4 teams, TEAM XLNC highest at AED 1,112,986
Backend: test_team_revenue_drill_down - TEAM XLNC has 15 agents, Aleesha first
Backend: test_month_comparison_endpoint - March 2026 vs February 2026, 26 days
Backend: test_sales_agent_closings_overall - Top 10 agents, Aleesha leads with 99 closings
Backend: test_today_transactions_endpoint - Returns correct structure (0 transactions today)
Backend: test_sales_by_course_endpoint - 45 courses with revenue data
Backend: test_monthly_trend_endpoint - 12 months of data from 2025-04 to 2026-03
Backend: test_leaderboard_endpoint - Muhammed Shanif #1 with AED 38,098
Backend: test_lead_funnel_endpoint - 2 stages (new_lead: 321, enrolled: 902)
Frontend: Sales Dashboard loads at /sales/dashboard with all metrics
Frontend: Period filter dropdown works - Overall, This Month, This Year options visible
Frontend: Top 10 Agents horizontal bar chart renders correctly
Frontend: Team-wise Revenue chart shows 4 teams with color-coded bars
Frontend: Monthly Revenue Trend area chart displays 12 months
Frontend: This Month vs Last Month comparison line chart displays
Frontend: Sales by Course donut chart with drill-down modal showing 45 courses
Frontend: Monthly Leaderboard shows top 5 agents with revenue (Muhammed Shanif: AED 38,098)
Frontend: Today's Transactions modal opens (shows 0 transactions today)
Frontend: Lead Pipeline chart is clickable - navigates to /sales
Frontend: All modals have max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto for scrollability
Frontend: Dark mode enabled with proper color contrast (muted-foreground: rgb(242, 242, 242))
Frontend: No future-dated data found (Apr-Dec 2026)

sales_dashboard_loads.details: Dashboard loads at /sales/dashboard with all key metrics (Revenue, Total Leads, Conversion, Avg Deal, Today)

date_filter_dropdown.details: Period filter works with Overall, Today, Yesterday, This Week, This Month, This Quarter, This Year, Custom Range options

team_revenue_chart_drill_down.details: Team-wise Revenue chart displays 4 teams (TEAM XLNC, TEAM CHALLENGE, TEAM GLADATOR, TEAM CLOSING MACHINE). Click opens drill-down modal showing individual agents.

top_10_agents_chart.details: Horizontal bar chart shows top 10 agents with closings count

monthly_revenue_trend.details: Area chart shows 12 months (2025-04 to 2026-03) with Revenue and Deals lines

month_comparison_chart.details: Line chart comparing March 2026 vs February 2026 cumulative revenue day-by-day

sales_by_course_donut.details: Donut chart shows course distribution. Clicking opens modal with 45 courses and their revenue.

monthly_leaderboard.details: Shows top 5 agents: Muhammed Shanif (#1, AED 38,098), Vismaya K, Sabsheera Nasri K, Aleesha, Fathima Sana

lead_pipeline_navigation.details: Clicking Lead Pipeline card navigates to /sales (Sales CRM)

today_transactions_modal.details: Today card is clickable, opens modal with Student/Course/Amount columns

scrollable_modals.details: DialogContent has max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto globally applied in dialog.jsx

color_contrast_dark_mode.details: Dark mode enabled. muted-foreground at 78% lightness (rgb 242,242,242), borders visible at 28% lightness.

no_future_dated_data.details: No revenue data found for Apr-Dec 2026. Monthly trend ends at 2026-03.

seed_data_creation: Using existing data: 902 enrolled students, 1223 total leads, 4 teams
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Sales Dashboard features verified working. Key endpoints: /api/dashboard/filtered-stats (with period param), /api/dashboard/team-revenue (with drill-down), /api/dashboard/month-comparison, /api/dashboard/sales-agent-closings, /api/dashboard/today-transactions, /api/dashboard/sales-by-course, /api/dashboard/monthly-trend, /api/dashboard/leaderboard, /api/dashboard/lead-funnel. All modals are scrollable via dialog.jsx (max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto). Dark mode color contrast improved (muted-foreground 78% lightness).
testing_method: Backend pytest (12 tests) + Playwright browser automation for frontend verification
